ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income level */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in km2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_freedoms" (
  "pf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personal freedom record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "pf_score" REAL /* Personal freedom score */,
  "pf_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country in personal freedom */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "pf_rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking from previous year */,
  "pf_score_change" REAL /* Change in score from previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_freedoms_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_freedoms" (
  "ef_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic freedom record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "ef_score" REAL /* Economic freedom score */,
  "ef_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country in economic freedom */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "ef_rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking from previous year */,
  "ef_score_change" REAL /* Change in score from previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ef_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_freedoms_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_freedoms" (
  "hf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each human freedom record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "hf_score" REAL /* Human freedom score */,
  "hf_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country in human freedom */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "hf_rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking from previous year */,
  "hf_score_change" REAL /* Change in score from previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_freedoms_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the data is stored */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column where the data is stored */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES human_freedoms ("hf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES personal_freedoms ("pf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_freedoms ("ef_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the data is stored */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column where the data is stored */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule */,
  "message" TEXT /* Error message to display if the rule is not met */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation rule */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "message" TEXT /* Error message if the validation failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the data visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES personal_freedoms ("pf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_freedoms ("ef_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES human_freedoms ("hf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
